property.name: cardTitle
property.label: Card Title
property.description: Custom heading shown at the top of the card. Defaults to 'Record Summary' when left blank.

property.name: theme
property.label: Color Theme
property.description: Visual theme for the card. Choose one of the 10 available color schemes.

property.name: objectApiName
property.label: Object API Name
property.description: API name of the object on this record page (e.g. Account, Contact). Auto-populated by the {!objectApiName} token.

property.name: openDateField
property.label: Open Date Field API Name
property.description: API name of the Date or DateTime field that marks when the record was opened (e.g. CreatedDate, Date_Opened__c). Leave blank to hide the Duration metric.

property.name: closeDateField
property.label: Close Date Field API Name
property.description: API name of the Date or DateTime field that marks when the record was closed (e.g. ClosedDate, Date_Closed__c). Leave blank to calculate duration against the current time for open records.
